Industrial automation that ships

Acme Robotics designs, builds, and commissions automation cells for small-batch manufacturers across the Midwest. We focus on machine tending, pick-and-place, and inspection. Our engineers spend time on your floor, not in slide decks.

What we do

  • Six-axis machine tending with vision-guided changeover.
  • Quality inspection with reject sorting at line speed.
  • Retrofit upgrades for ageing CNC and press lines.

Why teams pick us

Most cells ship in eight weeks. We instrument every project so you can track cycle time, uptime, and reject rate from day one. Pricing is fixed, scope is written down, and the team that scopes the project is the team that builds it.

Book a discovery call to talk through a line.
